mapper.select: SELECT id, step_name, series_name, product_id, step_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, status, cloth_paper_id, paper_type, step_id FROM pre_processing_steps WHERE step_id = #{stepId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY step_order ASC

SELECT id, step_name, series_name, product_id, step_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, status, cloth_paper_id, paper_type, step_id FROM pre_processing_steps WHERE step_id = #{stepId} AND series_name = #{seriesName} AND is_active = true ORDER BY step_order ASC

SELECT id, step_name, series_name, product_id, step_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, status, cloth_paper_id, paper_type, step_id FROM pre_processing_steps WHERE step_id = #{stepId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY step_order ASC

SELECT id, step_name, series_name, product_id, step_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, status, cloth_paper_id, paper_type, step_id FROM pre_processing_steps WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY step_id ASC, step_order ASC
SELECT id, step_name, series_name, product_id, step_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, status, cloth_paper_id, paper_type, step_id FROM pre_processing_steps WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT pps.id, pps.step_name, pps.series_name, pps.product_id, pps.step_order, pps.is_active, pps.description, pps.created_at, pps.updated_at, pps.status, pps.cloth_paper_id, pps.paper_type, pps.step_id, p.model_number AS product_model_number FROM pre_processing_steps pps LEFT JOIN products p ON pps.product_id = p.id WHERE pps.step_id = #{stepId} ORDER BY pps.step_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE pre_processing_steps SET step_name = #{stepName}, series_name = #{seriesName}, product_id = #{productId}, step_order = #{stepOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, status = #{status}, cloth_paper_id = #{clothPaperId}, paper_type = #{paperType} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, step_id, step_name, series_name, product_id, step_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, status, cloth_paper_id, paper_type FROM pre_processing_steps ORDER BY step_id ASC, series_name ASC, product_id ASC
